cir.text: <circuit> <components> <diode name="D1" anode="node1" cathode="node2"/> <diode name="D2" anode="node3" cathode="node4"/> <diode name="D3" anode="node5" cathode="node6"/> <diode name="D4" anode="node7" cathode="node8"/> <resistor name="R" value="R" node1="node9" node2="node10"/> <transformer primary_node1="node11" primary_node2="node12" secondary_node1="node13" secondary_node2="node14"/> <voltage_source name="Vs" type="AC" node1="node15" node2="node16"/> </components> <connections> <node id="node1"/> <node id="node2"/> <node id="node3"/> <node id="node4"/> <node id="node5"/> <node id="node6"/> <node id="node7"/> <node id="node8"/> <node id="node9"/> <node id="node10"/> <node id="node11"/> <node id="node12"/> <node id="node13"/> <node id="node14"/> <node id="node15"/> <node id="node16"/> </connections> </circuit>
